title: P256JWKPublicKey
description: P-256 public key encoded as a strict JWK-compatible object. key_id is SHA-256 over raw x || y bytes, lowercase hex.

x.description: P-256 x coordinate, base64url without padding.

y.description: P-256 y coordinate, base64url without padding.

key_id.description: SHA-256 over the raw P-256 coordinate bytes x || y, encoded as 64 lowercase hex characters.
